item.title: What is Machine Automata theory
item.description: Automata theory is the study of abstract machines and Automata, and how or what tasks can we solve with them.

item.title: Russian Khrushchevka Houses
item.description: Stalinka Between 1930 and 1950 with the leader ship of Staling, Russian had beautiful, complex and well made apartment design that was rich in the term of design level It’s important to mention that buildings like this constructed in industrial are of Russian.

item.title: Fuzzy Algorithm
item.description: A fuzzy system is a non-binary concept and computers used to make algorithms for vast software programs, we know this system more by its Searching mechanism.

item.title: ascii maker (ascm)
item.description: Make ascii from image inside the terminal, with the focus of optimizing the conversion time and capability.
